settings.title: We Are Now Planning 2027 Weddings
settings.excerpt: Our full planning calendar for next year is open, and the best venues are already being held.
settings.body:
It feels early, but the couples planning a 2027 wedding are right on time. The venues and photographers everyone wants get booked more than a year out.

Everafter is opening its full planning calendar for 2027 now. We take a limited number of full service couples each season so that no one ever feels like a number on a list.

Why booking early actually helps

The pieces that fill first are the ones you cannot duplicate. There is only one of your favourite venue on a given Saturday, and the photographers and bands with a following get claimed long before the date itself feels close.

  • Venues, which often book the prime dates a year or more ahead.
  • Photographers and bands, where the popular names go fast.
  • The peak season Saturdays, which always disappear first.

If you have a date or even a rough season in mind, an early conversation costs nothing and saves a great deal of scrambling later. Reach out and we will talk through what your year might look like.

How we work

We keep each season's list short on purpose, so the couples we take on get our full attention rather than a slice of it. That does mean the slots are genuinely limited.

An early chat is the best way to see if we are a good fit, with no commitment on either side. Tell us roughly when you are thinking, and we will sketch out how the year ahead could look before the best dates are gone.
